title: [PYCDE]
body:
I have two questions.

1. How do you represent a case statement in PyCDE? Is it supported?

2. Why does the generated Verilog contain multiple location paths? 
```
 
// Generated by CIRCT unknown git version
module ModA_4f805(	// {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:491 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:129}
  input              clk,
                     rst,
  input  [63:0]      cycle_count,
  input              trigger_counter_pop_valid,
  input  [31:0]      a,
  input              a_valid,
  input  [1:0][31:0] array_583e0_q_in,
  output             executed,
                     a_pop_ready,
                     array_583e0_w_port0,
  output [31:0]      array_583e0_wdata_port0,
  output             array_583e0_widx_port0
);

  wire trigger_counter_pop_valid_and_a_valid_and_trigger_counter_pop_valid =
    trigger_counter_pop_valid & a_valid;	// {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:1078 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:410 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:425 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:154 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:600 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:341 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:503 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:454}}}}}}}
  assign executed = trigger_counter_pop_valid_and_a_valid_and_trigger_counter_pop_valid;	// {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:114 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:119 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:143 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:129}}}, {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:1078 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:410 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:425 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:154 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:600 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:341 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:503 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:454}}}}}}}
  assign a_pop_ready =
    trigger_counter_pop_valid_and_a_valid_and_trigger_counter_pop_valid;	// {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:114 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:119 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:143 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:129}}}, {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:1078 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:410 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:425 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:154 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:600 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:341 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:503 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:454}}}}}}}
  assign array_583e0_w_port0 =
    trigger_counter_pop_valid_and_a_valid_and_trigger_counter_pop_valid & a[0];	// {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:114 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:119 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:143 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:129}}}, {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:1078 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:410 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:425 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:157 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:600 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:341 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:503 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:454}}}}}}}, {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:1078 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:329 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:151 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:600 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:341 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:503 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:454}}}}}}, {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:1078 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:410 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/signals.py:425 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:154 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:600 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:341 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/system.py:503 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:454}}}}}}}
  assign array_583e0_wdata_port0 = a;	// {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:114 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:119 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:143 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:129}}}
  assign array_583e0_widx_port0 = 1'h0;	// {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:114 <- {/home/zhonga/.local/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pycde/module.py:119 <- {/tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:143 <- /tmp/array_multi_read_verilog/design.py:129}}}, 
endmodule
```

Thanks for your patience.
